failed.title: Add Type Definitions for Missing Modules
failed.goal: Create type definitions for modules that cannot be found, ensuring TypeScript can properly resolve them.
failed.reason: The patch introduces a new PrismaClient instance and fetches workflows without addressing the original workflow editor functionality. This change is out of scope for the task and introduces risks without providing necessary context or justification.

failed.title: Fix Type Errors in Workflow Editor
failed.goal: Resolve type errors related to state management and data types in the WorkflowEditor component.
failed.reason: The code does not match the task as it completely removes all previous functionality and structure, replacing it with an empty component. This would result in a broken application.
